name: okaneland-mcp
description: Verified AI-tool prices and AI product margin math for agents.
long_description: Two tools for building and pricing AI products. get_ai_tool_prices returns live, human-verified pricing for 100+ AI tools (what is free, the real monthly cost, the gotcha, the last-verified date) from okaneland.com. calculate_ai_margin turns an AI product's MRR into what you keep after the token bill, card fees, failed payments, refunds and tax, plus the break-even price and usage cap. Runs locally over stdio; nothing to host.

tools.name: get_ai_tool_prices
tools.description: Current, human-verified pricing for 100+ AI tools, fetched live from the maintained index at okaneland.com.

tools.name: calculate_ai_margin
tools.description: Turns an AI product's MRR into what you keep after the token bill, fees, churn and tax, plus break-even price and usage cap.
